h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue applying the separation rule to another time signature and answer questions about the card's role.
The learner follows the tutor's step-by-step procedure of naming an object acting on the cart and placing the corresponding card for each arrow, as prompted.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Hand on cart. Right arrow after the label.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner completes the action of placing the card after correctly naming the object, enacting the instructed procedure.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner pressure triggers a reversal; the tutor's initial instruction suffices, and no adaptive mechanism is introduced.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no tutor uptake is contingent on re-reading.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Hand on cart. Right arrow after the label.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner completes the action of placing the card after correctly naming the object, enacting the instructed procedure.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no tutor uptake is contingent on re-reading.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner pressure triggers a reversal; the tutor's initial instruction suffices, and no adaptive mechanism is introduced.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner pressure triggers a reversal; the tutor's initial instruction suffices, and no adaptive mechanism is introduced.

scored.recoheredEarlier: Maybe the note should be `rainfall_mm`: recorded rainfall amount in millimeters for that city-month row.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue applying the row-limiter pattern to define fields and classify values, steadily building fluency.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: but is `city-month row` the right limiter here or is that phrase doing too much?
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: L4 moves from applying the limiter to critically evaluating its formulation, representing a new meta-criterion.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No later tutor turn exists to enact an adaptive mechanism.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No tutor mechanism because no tutor turn follows L4.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No later tutor turn to adapt to the pivot.
